# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: my-service-server
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  service: my-service
  port: 8080
  protocol: http
  authentication:
    # Add any authentication settings here
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: my-service-server-auth
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  serverRef:
    name: my-service-server
  allowedServiceAccounts:
    - name: my-service-account
      namespace: my-namespace
    - name: other-service-account
      namespace: other-namespace
  allowedServices:
    - name: other-service
      namespace: other-namespace
  port:
    port: 8080
    protocol: http
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: other-service-server
  namespace: other-namespace
spec:
  service: other-service
  port: 9090
  protocol: http
  authentication:
    # Add any authentication settings here
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: other-service-server-auth
  namespace: other-namespace
spec:
  serverRef:
    name: other-service-server
  allowedServiceAccounts:
    - name: other-service-account
      namespace: other-namespace
    - name: my-service-account
      namespace: my-namespace
  allowedServices:
    - name: my-service
      namespace: my-namespace
  port:
    port: 9090
    protocol: http
